## External PR policy

Thanks for your interest in RequestFlow.

This repository is issues-only and does not accept external pull requests.
Please open an issue or discussion instead so maintainers can triage the request.

- Bug: https://github.com/miguelmatg/requestflow-feedback/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml
- Improvement: https://github.com/miguelmatg/requestflow-feedback/issues/new?template=improvement_request.yml
- Question: https://github.com/miguelmatg/requestflow-feedback/discussions
